name: MAI-1-preview
archDisplay: Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) foundation model, total/active params undisclosed
note: Microsoft AI's first foundation model trained end-to-end in-house (pre+post-trained on ~15,000 H100s); debuted at rank #13 on the LMArena Text leaderboard (per LMArena's own Aug 2025 announcement), the first entry from a new provider into the Top 15. Feeds Copilot text use cases; also offered to trusted testers via API. Context window/param count undisclosed; ctxK is an unconfirmed estimate, not sourced.
